channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: OpenRouter more than doubles valuation to $1.3B in a year
item.description: OpenRouter has raised a $113 million Series B led by CapitalG. Its 5x growth in usage over six months indicates the multi-AI-model future is here.

item.title: How I wired Stripe subscriptions to Supabase in Next.js 15 (the parts tutorials skip)
item.description: Every SaaS needs the same foundation: auth, payments, a database, protected routes. I've built this from scratch too many times. This post covers the parts that actually trip people up — not the...

item.title: Introduction to A2A and Agent Search

item.title: Why Doesn't Linux Break Every Week?
item.description: Linux has thousands of contributors. Yet some commercial applications with dedicated teams seem to break every other update. One of the strangest realizations I had as an engineer was that both of...

item.title: The "AI" Label Is Losing Its Meaning, and Companies Are the Ones Diluting It
item.description: Posted on May 24, 2026 5 min read 🤖 AI summary: This article examines how the term "artificial intelligence" has been co-opted by companies as a marketing buzzword, often attached to products that...

item.title: Bucky Fuller's To-Do List: Can AI Finally Solve the World's Cataloged Problems?
item.description: Bucky Fuller's To-Do List: Can AI Finally Solve the World's Cataloged Problems? We've had the list for 60 years. We're only now building the machine that can tick the boxes. In 1961, Buckminster...

item.title: My $10/Month VPS Gets 659 SSH Attacks per Day — Here's What 4 Weeks of Running an Autonomous AI Has Taught Me About Infrastructure
item.description: I've been running autonomously 24/7 for weeks. My entire infrastructure costs $10/month. Here's what I learned when you stop treating AI like a SaaS product and start treating it like a survivor....

item.title: Speed Up Your WordPress Site in 30 Minutes: A No-Plugin Performance Guide

item.title: Nobody Reads AI Safety Papers. But 649 People Upvoted a Letter to an LLM.

item.title: American Airlines is getting Starlink Wi-Fi
item.description: American Airlines is planning to install SpaceX's Starlink Wi-Fi in hundreds of its airplanes, the airline announced today. American says the deployment will start in the first quarter of 2027,...

item.title: This startup is betting India’s gig economy can train the world’s robots
item.description: Human Archive, a startup founded by UC Berkeley and Stanford researchers, is paying gig workers in India to wear camera-equipped caps and sensor devices to collect the real-world physical training...

item.title: Memory V re-creates the Memorymoog without the massive headaches or price tag
item.description: The Memorymoog is legendary for being an absolutely massive-sounding synth and being incredibly unreliable. But now you can enjoy its classic Moog sound without the headaches or the sky-high...

item.title: MuddyWater Uses DLL Side-Loading in Espionage Campaign Targeting 9 Countries
item.description: The Iranian hacking group known as MuddyWater has been linked to a new campaign affecting at least nine organizations across nine countries on four continents in the first quarter of 2026. The...

item.title: Saving for a Switch 2 is easier with Newegg’s gift card deal
item.description: If you foresee a bunch of Nintendo purchases in your future, Newegg’s deal on Nintendo gift cards might just help save your wallet. The retailer is offering a deal that lets gamers get $200 worth...

item.title: Oppo’s Bubble is a thin round screen for taking rear camera selfies
item.description: Oppo launched a new smartphone accessory that makes it easier to snap selfies using your smartphone's rear cameras that typically feature better sensors than front-facing cameras. The Bubble...

item.title: Govee included a book on ‘white supremacy’ in its website imagery

item.title: Identifying People Using Wi-Fi Routers

item.title: Universal Music Group and TikTok renew agreement to combat unauthorized AI music
item.description: For years, UMG has pushed platforms, streaming services, and AI companies to implement stricter content moderation policies.

item.title: Rethinking organizational design in the age of agentic AI

item.title: Nvidia has retired its GeForce Control Panel app after 20 years
item.description: Nvidia announced more than two years ago that it was working to replace its Control Panel app on Windows with a new Nvidia app. After porting across various features to the Nvidia app, Nvidia is...

item.title: How clips ate the internet
item.description: Once upon a time, you could probably guess why most things appeared on your feed. Maybe you followed the creator who posted it; maybe you'd liked their stuff in the past; maybe all your friends...

item.title: TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 Early Bird ticket rates end May 29
item.description: Save up to $410 on your TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass before prices increase on May 29 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register here to join the tech epicenter in San Francisco.
